name: Watchtower Agentic Skills Protocol
description: This schema defines local Python scripts that AI Agents (LLMs) can invoke to autonomously execute commercial-grade NDR/EDR threat-hunting on the local host.

tools.name: watchtower_scan_network
tools.description: Executes a localized Network Detection & Response (NDR) scan natively mapping active TCP sockets. Analyzes process lineages and flags anomalous mass-socket allocations indicating C2 exfiltration bursts.

tools.name: watchtower_scan_file_entropy
tools.description: Evaluates the cryptographic Shannon Entropy of a specific given file path to preemptively classify mathematically obfuscated ransomware droppers before execution.

file_path.description: The absolute or relative path to the file you want to cryptographically assess.

tools.name: watchtower_scan_registry
tools.description: Performs a localized CIS Compliance check evaluating OS-level file permissions, shadow copy integrity, and unauthorized FireVault configurations.
